author: FacTech
name: FacTech Kickstart - Clean Architecture (.NET 9 + Nuxt.js 3)
description: Clean Architecture .NET 9 Web API + Nuxt.js 3 fullstack project template. Includes JWT Auth, RBAC, Multi-tenancy, MediatR, CQRS, FluentValidation, AutoMapper, Vuetify, Pinia, and more.

manualInstructions.text:
========================================
  Project created successfully!
========================================

Next steps:
  1. Backend:  cd Backend && dotnet restore
  2. Frontend: cd Frontend && npm install
  3. Update Backend/<PROJECT>.API/appsettings.json with your PostgreSQL credentials
  4. Run migrations:
     cd Backend
     dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate --project <PROJECT>.Infrastructure --startup-project <PROJECT>.API
     dotnet ef database update --project <PROJECT>.Infrastructure --startup-project <PROJECT>.API
  5. Start:
     Backend:  cd Backend && dotnet run --project <PROJECT>.API
     Frontend: cd Frontend && npm run dev
